name: Tauhu Goreng
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat enough oil in a wok or pan until about 2 inches deep. Deep-fry the bean-curd/tofu cakes until lightly browned. Remove and let cool.
2. Cut each cake into 2 pieces. Make a deep slit across the center to form a pocket.
3. Mix bean sprouts and cucumber in a bowl. Season well.
4. Fill the bean-curd/tofu pockets with the vegetable mixture.
5. To make the sauce, pound or blend chilis and garlic. Add soy sauce, vinegar, salt, ground peanuts, and water. Stir until smooth.
6. Arrange stuffed cakes on serving dish garnished with cucumber slices and cilantro leaves. Serve side of peanut sauce.
